top_signals.title: European stocks slide, but defense sector rallies after Ukraine ratifies $105 billion EU loan deal
top_signals.summary: European stocks finished Thursday lower as investors assessed news related to the Iran war and developments in Ukraine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin Dips Below $73,000 Despite Trump’s Crypto Capital Push
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin briefly fell below $73,000 despite a fresh push from Donald Trump for the CLARITY Act, suggesting pro-crypto messaging from  Washington is losing its ability to drive gains in digital assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Trump is pushing Canada and Mexico towards China - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Trump is pushing Canada and Mexico towards China  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dell shares jump 17% after server maker reports fastest sales growth since return to public market in 2018
top_signals.summary: Dell has gone from being a sleepy legacy tech company to a high-growth AI story, assembling servers packed with graphics processing units.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gemini crypto exchange launches AI data feed powered by Grok
top_signals.summary: The move comes as Gemini continues to expand beyond spot crypto trading into derivatives, predictions, and other financial services.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
